_comment: Drop this into .claude/settings.json (or merge with existing). Demonstrates the deterministic-formatting pattern from the CCA-F trap list — you don't trust Claude to remember to run the formatter, you wire it as a PostToolUse hook so the harness runs it every time.

hooks.command: uv run ruff format $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH && uv run ruff check $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH --fix
hooks._comment: Runs after Edit/Write/MultiEdit. $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH is the file Claude just touched.
Block dangerous bash commands. Hook returns non-zero → tool call is blocked and Claude sees the error.

permissions._comment: Scope tools to what this project actually needs. Less is more — exam answer for 'agent picks wrong tool' is usually 'tighten the allowlist'.
